<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\RequestMatcher; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\RequestMatcherInterface; /** * Checks the HTTP port of a Request. * * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ class PortRequestMatcher implements RequestMatcherInterface { public function __construct(private int $port) { } public function matches(Request $request): bool { return $request->getPort() === $this->port; } }
